subcodes.title: Words to Mr Herrigel, spoken on 1913-04-20
subcodes.first_line: The city of Vienna will become a center for the Cause of God: only after my departure the friends must not remain inactive. They must work with greater zeal
subcodes.first_line_orig: شماها باید از استتکارت باین حدود بیائید و بنشر نفحات اللّٰه بپردازید
